ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Choose between 3 modes to use the Day Planner plugin:
ast.target: 选择以下 3 种模式来使用日程规划插件：

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 文件模式

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Plugin automatically generates day planner notes for each day within a configurable folder.
ast.target: 插件会在可配置的文件夹中为每天自动生成日程规划笔记。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 命令模式

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Command used to insert a Day Planner for today within the current note.
ast.target: 用于在当前笔记中插入今日的日程规划的命令。

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 每日模式

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Plugin automatically links to the current daily note. Daily notes plugin must be enabled.
ast.target: 插件会自动链接到当前的每日笔记。必须启用每日笔记插件。

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where Day Planner files will be automatically created in File mode. Default: Day Planners
ast.target: 文件模式下自动创建 Day Planner 文件的文件夹。默认：Day Planners

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will automatically mark checkboxes for tasks and breaks in the past as complete (x)
ast.target: 插件会自动将过去的任务和休息的复选框标记为已完成 (x)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a circular progress bar in the status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示圆形进度条

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display now and next tasks in the status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示当前和下一个任务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notification when a new task is started
ast.target: 开始新任务时显示通知

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The zoom level to display the timeline. The higher the number, the more vertical space each task will take up.
ast.target: 用于显示时间线的缩放级别。数字越大，每个任务占用的垂直空间越多。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically resume timeline scrolling after manual scroll interaction stops.
ast.target: 手动滚动交互停止后自动恢复时间线滚动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The icon of the timeline pane. Reopen timeline pane or restart obsidian to see the change.
ast.target: 时间线窗格的图标。重新打开时间线窗格或重启 Obsidian 以查看更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gradient colors for the timeline (line, begin, end, hover begin, hover end, reset).
ast.target: 时间线的渐变颜色（线条、开始、结束、悬停开始、悬停结束、重置）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this heading text to mark the beginning of the Day Planner.
ast.target: 使用此标题文本标记日程规划的开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this label to mark break between tasks.
ast.target: 使用此标签标记任务之间的休息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this label to mark the end of all tasks.
ast.target: 使用此标签标记所有任务的结束。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace BREAK and END task text in your planner with the configured label text (consistency)
ast.target: 将计划中的 BREAK 和 END 任务文本替换为配置的标签文本（保持一致性）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve these values in the schedule, for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.
ast.target: 在日程中保留这些值，例如“ - ”表示取消，或“ > ”表示改期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide tasks with these values from the timeline view, for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.
ast.target: 在时间线视图中隐藏包含这些值的任务，例如“ - ”表示取消，或“ > ”表示改期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hour when a new day begins (0-23). Times before this hour are treated as next day. Default: 0 (midnight). Example: Set to 4 if you work until 3 AM and want those tasks in the same planner.
ast.target: 新一天开始的小时（0-23）。此小时之前的时间会被视为次日。默认值：0（午夜）。示例：如果你工作到凌晨3点，并希望这些任务在同一计划中，将其设为4。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
